summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: NumberPlane with static vector-field arrows for linear ODE ẋ = Ax with A = [[-0.3, -1.2], [1.0, -0.3]] (eigenvalues -0.3 ± i√1.2, stable spiral). ValueTracker t_tr drives 12 precomputed color-coded tracer dots via always_redraw through their trajectories + growing trails — all spiral inward. Side panel has A, eigenvalues, 'stable spiral'.
